
## Transient information table

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transientRaw = FileAttachment("data/bundibugyo-transient-info.csv").csv({typed: false})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transientColumns = transientRaw.length > 0
  ? Object.keys(transientRaw[0]).filter(c =>
      c &&
      c.trim() !== "" &&
      !/^_+$/.test(c.trim()) &&
      !c.startsWith("__") &&
      !c.toLowerCase().startsWith("unnamed")
    )
  : []
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transientTable = transientRaw.map(row =>
  Object.fromEntries(
    transientColumns.map(column => [column, row[column]])
  )
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

html`<div class="status-box">
<strong>${transientTable.length}</strong> records loaded from this information table.<br>
<strong>${transientColumns.length}</strong> columns detected.
</div>`
```

### Search this table

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof searched_transient = Inputs.search(
  transientTable,
  {placeholder: "Search this table..."}
)
```

<details class="filter-panel">
<summary><strong>Filter this table</strong></summary>

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transientCleanValue = value =>
  value === null || value === undefined ? "" : String(value).trim()
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transientFilterableColumns = transientColumns.filter(column =>
  column &&
  column.trim() !== "" &&
  !/^_+$/.test(column.trim()) &&
  column.trim() !== "__evidence"
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

transientFilterOptions = Object.fromEntries(
  transientFilterableColumns.map(column => [
    column,
    ["All", ...Array.from(
      new Set(
        transientTable
          .map(row => transientCleanValue(row[column]))
          .filter(value => value !== "")
      )
    ).sort()]
  ])
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof selectedTransientFilters = Inputs.form(
  Object.fromEntries(
    transientFilterableColumns.map(column => [
      column,
      Inputs.select(transientFilterOptions[column], {label: column})
    ])
  )
)
```

</details>

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

filtered_transient = searched_transient.filter(row =>
  transientFilterableColumns.every(column =>
    selectedTransientFilters[column] === "All" ||
    transientCleanValue(row[column]) === selectedTransientFilters[column]
  )
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

html`<div class="status-box">
<strong>${filtered_transient.length}</strong> records shown after search and filters.
</div>`
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Inputs.table(filtered_transient, {
  columns: transientColumns,
  height: 500,
  select: false
})
```
